message:
fix: handle dirty working tree in daemon syncWorkspace (gt-jtia8)

syncWorkspace git pull --rebase fails with unstaged changes on dirty
trees and never recovers. Fix: auto-stash before pull and restore after,
log failures as Warning not INFO, escalate to Error after 3 consecutive
failures, add isWorkingTreeDirty helper using git status --porcelain.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
